mapper.select: select carNo, entryTime, exitTime, coupon,storeName from Car where carNo = #{carNo}
mapper.update: update Store set coupon_count = coupon_count - 1 where store_name = #{storeName} and coupon_count > 0
update Car set coupon = #{couponAmount}, storeName='하이미디어' where carNo =#{carNo} and exitTime is null
